SMM: enter
EAX=00000000 EBX=00000000 ECX=02000000 EDX=02000628
ESI=0000000b EDI=02000000 EBP=06feb0e0 ESP=00006d5c
EIP=000ebede EFL=00000046 [---Z-P-] CPL=0 II=0 A20=1 SMM=0 HLT=0
ES =0010 00000000 ffffffff 00cf9300 DPL=0 DS   [-WA]
CS =0008 00000000 ffffffff 00cf9b00 DPL=0 CS32 [-RA]
SS =0010 00000000 ffffffff 00cf9300 DPL=0 DS   [-WA]
DS =0010 00000000 ffffffff 00cf9300 DPL=0 DS   [-WA]
FS =0010 00000000 ffffffff 00cf9300 DPL=0 DS   [-WA]
GS =0010 00000000 ffffffff 00cf9300 DPL=0 DS   [-WA]
LDT=0000 00000000 0000ffff 00008200 DPL=0 LDT
TR =0000 00000000 0000ffff 00008b00 DPL=0 TSS32-busy
GDT=     000f6220 00000037
IDT=     000f625e 00000000
CR0=00000011 CR2=00000000 CR3=00000000 CR4=00000000
DR0=00000000 DR1=00000000 DR2=00000000 DR3=00000000 
DR6=ffff0ff0 DR7=00000400
CCS=00000044 CCD=ffffffff CCO=EFLAGS
EFER=0000000000000000
SMM: after RSM

Servicing hardware INT=0x20
     0: v=20 e=0000 i=0 cpl=0 IP=0008:000015c8 pc=000015c8 SP=0010:0008ffec env->regs[R_EAX]=00000000
EAX=00000000 EBX=00001000 ECX=00000f69 EDX=0000000e
ESI=00007c78 EDI=00008000 EBP=0008fff4 ESP=0008ffec
EIP=000015c8 EFL=00000202 [-------] CPL=0 II=0 A20=1 SMM=0 HLT=0
ES =0010 00000000 ffffffff 00cf9300 DPL=0 DS   [-WA]
CS =0008 00000000 ffffffff 00cf9a00 DPL=0 CS32 [-R-]
SS =0010 00000000 ffffffff 00cf9300 DPL=0 DS   [-WA]
DS =0010 00000000 ffffffff 00cf9300 DPL=0 DS   [-WA]
FS =0010 00000000 ffffffff 00cf9300 DPL=0 DS   [-WA]
GS =0010 00000000 ffffffff 00cf9300 DPL=0 DS   [-WA]
LDT=0000 00000000 0000ffff 00008200 DPL=0 LDT
TR =0000 00000000 0000ffff 00008b00 DPL=0 TSS32-busy
GDT=     00007c78 00000017
IDT=     00004020 000007ff
CR0=80000011 CR2=00000000 CR3=00006000 CR4=00000000
DR0=00000000 DR1=00000000 DR2=00000000 DR3=00000000 
DR6=ffff0ff0 DR7=00000400
CCS=00000010 CCD=0008ffec CCO=ADDL
EFER=0000000000000000
check_exception old: 0xffffffff new 0xd
     1: v=0d e=0008 i=0 cpl=0 IP=0008:000015c8 pc=000015c8 SP=0010:0008ffec env->regs[R_EAX]=00000000
EAX=00000000 EBX=00001000 ECX=00000f69 EDX=0000000e
ESI=00007c78 EDI=00008000 EBP=0008fff4 ESP=0008ffec
EIP=000015c8 EFL=00000202 [-------] CPL=0 II=0 A20=1 SMM=0 HLT=0
ES =0010 00000000 ffffffff 00cf9300 DPL=0 DS   [-WA]
CS =0008 00000000 ffffffff 00cf9a00 DPL=0 CS32 [-R-]
SS =0010 00000000 ffffffff 00cf9300 DPL=0 DS   [-WA]
DS =0010 00000000 ffffffff 00cf9300 DPL=0 DS   [-WA]
FS =0010 00000000 ffffffff 00cf9300 DPL=0 DS   [-WA]
GS =0010 00000000 ffffffff 00cf9300 DPL=0 DS   [-WA]
LDT=0000 00000000 0000ffff 00008200 DPL=0 LDT
